ddls:
CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "obs_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the observation */,
  "total_employment" INTEGER /* Total number of employed individuals */,
  "gnp_deflator" REAL /* GNP deflator value */,
  "gnp" REAL /* Gross National Product in monetary terms */,
  "unemployment_rate" INTEGER /* Unemployment rate percentage */,
  "armed_forces" INTEGER /* Number of armed forces personnel */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data record */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate of the national currency */,
  "public_debt" REAL /* Total public debt */,
  "trade_balance" REAL /* Trade balance (exports - imports) */,
  "consumer_price_index" REAL /* Consumer price index */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Central bank's interest rate */,
  "sectoral_employment" TEXT /* Employment data by sector */,
  "sectoral_gdp" TEXT /* GDP data by sector */,
  "geographical_data" TEXT /* Geographical data (e.g., urban vs. rural population) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("obs_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the economic data */,
  "is_leap_year" INTEGER /* Indicates if the year is a leap year */,
  "calendar_type" TEXT /* Type of calendar used (e.g., Gregorian, Julian) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_stats" (
  "employment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the employment statistics record */,
  "obs_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the observation ID from economic_indicators table */,
  "employment_count" INTEGER /* Number of employed individuals */,
  "unemployment_count" INTEGER /* Number of unemployed individuals */,
  "labor_force_participation_rate" REAL /* Labor force participation rate */,
  "unemployment_duration" TEXT /* Average duration of unemployment */,
  "employment_sectors" TEXT /* Employment data by sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_stats_obs_id FOREIGN KEY ("obs_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("obs_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gnp_stats" (
  "gnp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the GNP statistics record */,
  "obs_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the observation ID from economic_indicators table */,
  "gnp_value" REAL /* GNP value for the observation */,
  "gnp_per_capita" REAL /* GNP per capita */,
  "gnp_growth_rate" REAL /* Annual growth rate of GNP */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gnp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gnp_stats_obs_id FOREIGN KEY ("obs_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("obs_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "armed_forces_stats" (
  "armed_forces_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the armed forces statistics record */,
  "obs_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the observation ID from economic_indicators table */,
  "armed_forces_count" INTEGER /* Count of armed forces personnel */,
  "defense_budget" REAL /* Total defense budget */,
  "military_personnel_by_branch" TEXT /* Number of personnel by military branch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("armed_forces_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_armed_forces_stats_obs_id FOREIGN KEY ("obs_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("obs_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_stats" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the population statistics record */,
  "obs_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the observation ID from economic_indicators table */,
  "population_count" INTEGER /* Total population count */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Age distribution of the population */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Gender distribution of the population */,
  "urban_population" INTEGER /* Urban population */,
  "rural_population" INTEGER /* Rural population */,
  "birth_rate" REAL /* Birth rate */,
  "death_rate" REAL /* Death rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_stats_obs_id FOREIGN KEY ("obs_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("obs_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or division the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "obs_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "data_accessed" TEXT /* Brief description of the data accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_obs_id FOREIGN KEY ("obs_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("obs_id")
)
